review_snippets.text: Had my house pressure washed today, and wow and what a difference! David showed up on time, worked efficiently, and made sure everything looked spotless before they left. review_snippets.name: matt s.
review_snippets.text: Veteran Pressure Washing did an incredible job. My before-and-after photo speaks for itself. Our Lagomar neighborhood in Virginia Beach is loaded with trees, so most of the homes are in constant shade and prone to algae growth. They took the time to clean every detail, restoring

review_snippets.name: Joan B.
review_snippets.text: David came pressure washed the house yesterday. It looks awesome. The windows and glass doors sparkle in the sun. I was impressed would recommend him greatly.

review_snippets.name: Susan T.
review_snippets.text: David did an excellent job getting the algae and discoloration off my house which is both vinyl and brick. Big, big deal for me was that there was no damage to my gardens. I’m planning to have David repeat his work next year as algae is an ongoing problem.
